history.content: Quick startup state: task and schedule systems are currently unavailable in this snapshot, so there are no live task/schedule items I can verify right now. Today’s notes emphasize that memory sync correctly no-op’d when signal was low, intraday logs can be intermittent (so graceful no-file handling is important), and a prior X→Telegram flow stalled because `browser_send_to_telegram` was an unknown tool with no immediate fallback, leaving a plan step unfinished. Where things left off: we clarified runtime context/compaction behavior and identified the need for explicit fallback handling when a tool call fails.
